name: Crockpot Beef & Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Salt pork, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in water overnight.
2. Brown the salt pork in a skillet or directly in the slow cooker if you have one.
3. Add the soaked beans, water, browned salt pork, and remaining ingredients to the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on low for 9-10 hours.
